# Better Robots.txt - full context

Better Robots.txt is a WordPress plugin focused on crawl policy, guided robots.txt setup, AI-related usage signals, and edition-based controls.

## Product intent
The product is designed to help website owners publish a clearer crawl policy for search engines, AI crawlers, archive bots, SEO tools, social preview bots, and other automated agents.

## Key pages
- https://better-robots.com/
- https://better-robots.com/presets/
- https://better-robots.com/robots-txt-examples/
- https://better-robots.com/pricing/
- https://better-robots.com/download/
- https://better-robots.com/governance/
- https://better-robots.com/governance/ai-usage-policy/
- https://better-robots.com/contact/

## Important note
Signals such as robots.txt, llms.txt, and AI usage signals are useful because they express intent clearly. They are not the same thing as forced access control.
